name: Playspace
description: Top-level play area. A Playspace belongs to an Agent (Playspace OF Agent) — typically one Playspace per player. The Playspace owns a collection of Zones via OF (Zone OF Playspace). The four canonical Zone subtypes are Hand (cards in possession), Deck (draw pile), DiscardPile (used cards face up), and BanishPile (removed-from-game cards). Each Card carries its current Zone via HAS (Card HAS Zone), so the Zone a card occupies is a first-class fact you can query without walking through Print/Position. Depends on bundle-cards (for Card and Zone) and bundle-agency (for Agent).
